preconditions: Current header screenshot and all app screens available
steps: Review the shared header on scanner, results, settings, history, analyzing, and splash screens against hierarchy, balance, and touch-target consistency.
expected_result: Header uses a consistent branded shell, clear title hierarchy, and stable action placement across all screens.

expected_result: Whole-food ingredient lists return NOVA 1 and empty markers.

preconditions: Android instrumentation environment available; test-safe camera mode enabled
expected_result: App moves from splash to scanner to results to history using the demo path without backend integration.

preconditions: Android instrumentation environment available; test-safe camera mode enabled
steps: Launch app shell with enableLiveCamera=false and trigger Scan Label.

preconditions: Run app on emulator and phone widths
steps: Visit all screens and verify footer visibility, wrapping, and spacing under short and long content.
expected_result: Footer remains visible, centered, and visually subordinate across screens.

preconditions: Run app on narrow and wide devices
steps: Check header wrapping, chip truncation, and icon spacing on multiple screen widths.
expected_result: Title remains readable, chips truncate gracefully, and action buttons remain tappable without overlap.
